text: The provisions of this article apply to off-highway motor vehicles of the United States or its agencies, to the extent authorized by federal law.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 16.5. OFF-HIGHWAY VEHICLES [38000 - 38604]
### Chapter 6. Equipment of Off-Highway Vehicles [38325 - 38397]
#### Article 5. Emission Control Equipment [38390 - 38397]
##### § 38396

The provisions of this article apply to off-highway motor vehicles of the United States or its agencies, to the extent authorized by federal law.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1093.)*

subsections.text: The provisions of this article apply to off-highway motor vehicles of the United States or its agencies, to the extent authorized by federal law.
